frame_analyses.description: Setup screen with dialog box visible, instruments not yet engaged
Instruments visible, needle holder grasping suture near Penrose drain with black marks
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good instrument positioning, suture appears properly loaded

frame_analyses.description: Instruction overlay shows 'Pierce the Penrose drain through the two black dots', suture being positioned
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Precise targeting of marked locations visible

frame_analyses.description: Instruction shows 'Make a double-throw knot', instruments positioned for surgeon's knot formation
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper setup for double throw technique

frame_analyses.description: Completing first throw with double wrap technique, suture positioned across drain slit
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good surgeon's knot formation, appears secure

frame_analyses.description: Instruction shows 'Make a single-throw knot', beginning second throw with hand switch
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clear hand switching visible for proper technique

frame_analyses.description: Instruction shows 'Make another single-throw knot', performing final throw
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Consistent technique maintained through all throws

frame_analyses.description: Dialog asking 'Change to Shears?' with Yes/No options, preparing for cutting phase
Instruction shows 'Cut the suture from both sides', scissors positioned for cutting
Task completed, knot secured in place, both suture ends cut, drain slit appears closed
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Final result shows well-positioned knot with complete closure

knot_assessments.notes: Proper double throw surgeon's knot executed with good technique
Single throw with proper hand switch, good tension
Final single throw with hand switch, knot appears well-secured

drain_assessment.assessment_note: Drain slit appears completely closed with no visible gaps, knot properly positioned

technique_summary: Excellent performance with proper surgeon's knot followed by two single throws with correct hand switching. Suture placement was accurate and drain closure was complete.
improvement_suggestions: Continue practicing to maintain this excellent level of performance
Focus on maintaining consistent timing across all phases
